mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as report_count, COUNT(DISTINCT institution) as institution_count, MAX(report_date) as latest_report_date FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 365 DAY)

SELECT report_title, rating, institution, DATE_FORMAT(report_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as report_date, name as stock_name FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT fund_code) as fund_count, SUM(float_ratio) as total_float_ratio, SUM(market_value) as total_market_value FROM stock_fund_holder WHERE stock_code = #{code} AND report_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 120 DAY)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(report_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as report_date, org_name, content_summary FROM stock_institution_research WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY report_date DESC
